name: The Pogue killer (Rafe Cameron)
description:
Rafe never really saw any bad in what he was doing. I mean, why would he, he was just getting the job done.

Rafe is the pogue killer

should I make this a series and if it should be one where I just turned random Characters into Ghostface or just Rafe?

Sorry that i've been gone for a while, I've been having shit go on for a while but for October being my favorite season i made this.
creator: The world outside!
